nodes.title: Frame 2
widgets_values: Exact same bathroom, warm white plaster walls, travertine tile floor, frosted window with morning light, now with a freestanding oval soaking bathtub in matte white placed beside the window, clean simple silhouette, no fixtures or accessories yet, soft morning light, photorealistic interior photography, cinematic

nodes.title: Frame 3
widgets_values: Exact same bathroom, warm white plaster walls, travertine floor, frosted window, matte white freestanding bathtub, now with a solid oak vanity unit with a single undermount ceramic basin placed against the wall, brushed brass tap, nothing on the vanity yet, warm afternoon light, photorealistic interior photography, cinematic

nodes.title: Frame 4
widgets_values: Exact same bathroom, warm white plaster walls, travertine floor, frosted window, matte white bathtub, oak vanity with brass tap, now with two warm brushed brass wall sconces mounted on either side of the vanity glowing soft amber, a single exposed filament bulb pendant hanging above the bathtub, golden hour light filtering through the frosted window, photorealistic interior photography, cinematic

nodes.title: Frame 5
widgets_values: Exact same bathroom, warm white plaster walls, travertine floor, frosted window, matte white bathtub, oak vanity with brass tap, brass sconces and pendant glowing, now with a large round brass framed mirror above the vanity, two oversized folded linen towels in warm oatmeal draped over the edge of the bathtub, a small woven cotton bath mat on the floor, golden hour light, photorealistic interior photography, cinematic

nodes.title: Frame 6
widgets_values: Exact same bathroom, warm white plaster walls, travertine floor, frosted window, matte white bathtub with linen towels, oak vanity with brass tap, brass sconces and pendant glowing, round brass mirror, cotton bath mat, now with a small ceramic tray on the vanity holding a soap dish and a single white candle, a trailing pothos plant in a terracotta pot on the windowsill, two glass apothecary bottles with bath salts beside the tub, warm golden light, photorealistic interior photography, cinematic

nodes.title: Frame 7
widgets_values: Exact same bathroom as previous image, warm white plaster walls, travertine tile floor, frosted window centered on the back wall above the bathtub, pendant light hanging from ceiling center, brass wall sconces on left and right walls, oak vanity with round brass mirror on the right wall, matte white freestanding bathtub against the left wall with linen towels, pothos plant on windowsill, woven bath mat on floor, now adding only a frameless glass shower panel in the far right corner behind the vanity with travertine tiles on that corner wall and brass rain shower head, everything else unchanged, photorealistic interior photography, cinematic, Flux 2 Klein

nodes.title: Frame 1
widgets_values: Empty bathroom, bare warm white plaster walls, clean light travertine tile floor, one frosted glass window with soft diffused morning light, high ceiling, completely empty, quiet and minimal, photorealistic interior photography, cinematic, Flux 2 Klein
